tests.test_auth
===============

.. py:module:: tests.test_auth


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   tests.test_auth.test_login_page_loads
   tests.test_auth.test_successful_login
   tests.test_auth.test_failed_login


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: test_login_page_loads(client)

   Ensure the login page HTML loads successfully.


.. py:function:: test_successful_login(client, mock_db)

   Test that providing correct credentials logs the user in.


.. py:function:: test_failed_login(client, mock_db)

   Test that bad credentials keep you on the login page.
